meaning: adj.焦点的,有焦点的,在焦点上的
examples: The focal point for the town's many visitors is the museum.
Consequently, even as the blogosphere continues to expand, only a few blogs are likely to emerge as focal points.
The castle forms the focal point of the city.
The high-end Schneider lens offers a 24mm, ultra-wide focal length and 3x optical zoom.
"The smartphone is becoming the focal point of the personal communications experience, " noted Restivo.
